ava-√śiṣ Pass. -śiṣyate, to be left as a remnant, remain,  TBr. ;  ŚBr. ;  MBh.  &c.:
Caus. (Pot. -śeṣayet) to leave as a remnant,  MBh. v, 2638 ;  R. v, 26, 38.

results.rendered_html:
avaśiṣ (Used mostly in pass.) To be left last or as a remainder, to remain over or behind;  Bg. 7. 2. 
— Caus. To leave as a remainder; dehamātrāvaśeṣitaḥ  Bhāg.
